scale.notes: 2 and 4 are intermediate points with no descriptor. Use when a player clearly exceeds one anchor but has not fully reached the next.

descriptors.1: Ball bounces away; receives square-on with no idea what's behind them
descriptors.3: Controls most passes cleanly; occasionally opens body shape before receiving
descriptors.5: Consistently opens up half-sideways before the ball arrives, shifts it into space in one movement

descriptors.1: Head down when running with ball; loses it under light pressure
descriptors.3: Can carry at pace in space; slows down under pressure
descriptors.5: Comfortable carrying at speed, changes direction to beat a press

descriptors.1: No clear intention when facing a defender; slows down or passes backwards
descriptors.3: Attempts to take on a defender; success inconsistent, tends to use one move only
descriptors.5: Can beat a defender with a change of pace or direction, knows when to take on and when to pass

descriptors.1: Frequently mishits or misses target; defaults to kicking rather than passing
descriptors.3: Accurate to a stationary teammate within 10m; weight sometimes off
descriptors.5: Consistent accuracy and weight; plays to feet or into space as appropriate

descriptors.1: Always plays short or forward; doesn't look to the far side
descriptors.3: Recognises space on the other side and attempts to switch; accuracy inconsistent
descriptors.5: Switches play deliberately and accurately, changing the point of attack

descriptors.1: Scuffs or balloons most attempts; no clear striking technique
descriptors.3: Gets shots on target from central positions; power and accuracy developing
descriptors.5: Can strike with both power and placement; attempts from wider angles too

descriptors.1: Plays the restart to the nearest player regardless of whether they're marked; no awareness of options
descriptors.3: Looks before playing; finds a free player most of the time but decision can be slow
descriptors.5: Uses restarts purposefully to maintain possession or play forward into space; varies delivery based on what's on

descriptors.1: Dives in immediately; easily turned
descriptors.3: Stays on feet, shows attacker onto weaker side; timing of challenges developing
descriptors.5: Reads the attacker's body shape, delays, wins the ball cleanly

descriptors.1: Stands still waiting for the ball; easy to mark, gives the passer no options
descriptors.3: Makes runs to get free some of the time; movement is sometimes too early or in the wrong direction
descriptors.5: Consistently moves to create an angle, times the run so they're free when the ball arrives

descriptors.1: Doesn't know their starting position or drifts far from it
descriptors.3: Knows where to stand; moves back into shape after the ball is lost
descriptors.5: Adjusts position based on where the ball is, not just their own zone

descriptors.1: Stands and watches; doesn't offer angles
descriptors.3: Moves to offer one option nearby; angle and timing sometimes off
descriptors.5: Offers two options at different depths, stays in the passer's sightline

descriptors.1: Silent during play; teammates don't know where she is or what she wants
descriptors.3: Calls for the ball and occasionally warns teammates under pressure; not yet a habit
descriptors.5: Constantly talking — calls for the ball, warns 'man on', directs teammates during transitions and set pieces

descriptors.1: Panics when pressed in own half; kicks blindly or forces a risky pass through the middle
descriptors.3: Recognises pressure early; looks for the safe option (back to keeper, wide, or out of play) most of the time
descriptors.5: Stays calm under a press, plays simply and quickly to relieve pressure, communicates to help teammates

descriptors.1: Holds the ball too long or rushes; doesn't look before receiving
descriptors.3: Makes the right pass most of the time in space; takes one extra touch when not needed
descriptors.5: Looks before receiving, carries when space is there, plays quickly when a teammate is free

descriptors.1: Ball-watches; doesn't press or drops off randomly
descriptors.3: Presses the ball carrier when it's clear to do so; cover position still developing
descriptors.5: Triggers a press at the right moment, reads teammates' positions before pressing

descriptors.1: Stops when possession is won; waits to be told what to do
descriptors.3: Recognises when the team has won the ball and reacts quickly
descriptors.5: Immediately pushes forward after winning it, looks to exploit the disorganised defence

descriptors.1: Doesn't track back or get goal-side; ball-watches after losing it
descriptors.3: Gets goal-side after losing possession; recovery run speed inconsistent
descriptors.5: Sprints back into shape, communicates to help teammates reorganise

descriptors.1: Drops or parries balls she should hold; uncomfortable with shots at height
descriptors.3: Holds most shots at her body cleanly; diving stops still developing
descriptors.5: Gets behind the ball consistently, strong hands, deals with shots across her body

descriptors.1: Rolls or throws without looking; frequently gives it to a pressured teammate
descriptors.3: Finds a free player short most of the time; decision on when to distribute sometimes slow
descriptors.5: Distributes quickly to the free player, varying between feet and hands based on the situation

descriptors.1: Kicks without purpose or accuracy; ball frequently goes straight to opposition
descriptors.3: Can reach a target area with a goal kick; accuracy and consistency still developing
descriptors.5: Uses goal kicks and drop kicks intentionally to switch play or find a target player

descriptors.1: Stays on the line; doesn't claim crosses or organise defenders
descriptors.3: Claims some crosses; starting to communicate with defenders but not consistently
descriptors.5: Claims crosses confidently, organises the backline, comes off her line to deal with through balls

descriptors.1: Stays rooted to the centre of the goal; doesn't adjust to the ball's position
descriptors.3: Moves to narrow the angle on central shots; positioning for wide balls still developing
descriptors.5: Consistently sets her position based on where the ball is, making herself big without being exposed

priority.formula_note: priority_score = (6 - avg_score) * effective_position_weight + dependency_bonus. avg_score = mean(coach_score, player_score) if both present, else coach_score. effective_position_weight = primary_weight * primary_blend + secondary_weight * secondary_blend, using secondary_position_blend table.
